achievements.title: Who Am I?
achievements.description: Clear Story Mode for the first time, or earn a Sonic & Diablon ending if 3 or more endings are cleared.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: I Am...
achievements.description: Clear Story Mode for the second time, or earn an Egg Dealer ending if 3 or more endings are cleared.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: All of Me
achievements.description: Clear Story Mode for the third time, or earn a Black Doom ending if 3 or more endings are cleared.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Never Turn Back
achievements.description: Clear Last Story.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Shadow the Hedgehog, Baby
achievements.description: Clear Expert Mode.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Westopolis All-Star
achievements.description: Earn all S ranks and find all Red Rings in Westopolis.

achievements.description: Earn the S rank and find all Red Rings in The Last Way.

achievements.title: Boss All-Star
achievements.description: Earn an S rank on every boss.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Expert Boss Buster I
achievements.description: Defeat the 2 Black Bull Expert bosses in one session. (No weapon androids.)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Expert Boss Buster II
achievements.description: Defeat the 3 Egg Breaker Expert bosses in one session. (No weapon androids.)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Expert Boss Buster III
achievements.description: Defeat Heavy Dog and Blue Falcon on Expert in one session. (No weapon androids.)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Expert Boss Buster IV
achievements.description: Defeat the 3 Sonic & Diablon bosses in one session. (No weapon androids.)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Expert Boss Buster V
achievements.description: Defeat the 3 Egg Dealer bosses in one session. (No weapon androids.)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Expert Boss Buster VI
achievements.description: Defeat the 3 Black Doom bosses in one session. (No weapon androids.)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: initialize(bullet)
achievements.description: Clear any stage besides Devil Doom with an S rank as a bullet android.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: initialize(cannon)
achievements.description: Clear any stage besides Devil Doom with an S rank as a cannon android.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: It's Always Time for Shadow Fever
achievements.description: End a boss stage with Chaos Blast.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Ultimate Life Form Delivery Service
achievements.description: In Westopolis, grab the first crate and then activate save points 2 to 6 without dropping it.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Lightspeed Ring Hunt
achievements.description: In Digital Circuit, collect 300 rings or more in 3:00.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Canyon Crossing
achievements.description: In Glyphic Canyon, activate save point 6 without using Dash Ramps, the Black Volt, or Chaos Control.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Because Motorcycles Are Cooler
achievements.description: In Lethal Highway, reach the final map sign in 2:40 without being on foot for more than half of the required time.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Shadow Rally Championship
achievements.description: In Lethal Highway on Expert Mode, reach the final map sign before the Black Tank does at 2:40. (No Chaos Control Glitch)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: A Shocking Discovery
achievements.description: In Cryptic Castle, find a room with a magnetic barrier between save points 5 and 6.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Acid Surfing for Life
achievements.description: In Prison Island, board an Air Saucer near save point 2 and remain on it until having activated the last save point.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Empty Air Tank
achievements.description: In Prison Island on Expert Mode, clear the stage without using Air Saucers. (No Chaos Control Glitch)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: The Ultimate Prankster
achievements.description: In Circus Park, spook Tails with a certain pop-up dummy.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Bonus Prizes
achievements.description: In Circus Park, find a secret on top of a slide and inside a big tent.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Gallery Gunslinger
achievements.description: In Circus Park, win the 50-ring award from all 7 shooting games in one session.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Central City Circuit
achievements.description: In Central City, activate all 6 save points in 1:30.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Dark Demolitions Delivery Service
achievements.description: In Central City, grab the first GUN bomb (or nearby crate) and detonate every city annihilator bomb without dropping it.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Soul: Corrupted
achievements.description: In The Doom, awaken Dark Shadow in a secret gas room.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Cloudrunner
achievements.description: In Sky Troops on Expert Mode, clear the stage in 3:20 without using Chaos Control.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: EGG-secute Attack Function
achievements.description: In Mad Matrix, destroy all 6 Egg Pawns on the islands between the 4 towers without dying.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Where Did You Get This?
achievements.description: In Death Ruins, find a knife between save points 2 and 4.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Ring Rider
achievements.description: In The ARK, clear the Normal mission in 3:00 and with 400 rings or more.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Alien Pathways
achievements.description: In Air Fleet, clear the Normal mission without dying and without getting any Hero points.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: You Might Look Like Me...
achievements.description: In Iron Jungle, destroy 35 Eggman robots in 3:00.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Upward Velocity
achievements.description: In Iron Jungle on Expert Mode, clear the stage in 1:30 without using Chaos Control.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Space Colony ARK Delivery Service
achievements.description: In Space Gadget, grab the first crate and reach the first Goal Ring without dropping it.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Lost Passage
achievements.description: In Lost Impact, find a secret Gold Beetle room.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Betrayal
achievements.description: In Lost Impact, be knocked off the GUN lift by Maria.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: DEATH TO ALL WHO OPPOSE ME!
achievements.description: In GUN Fortress, awaken Dark Shadow before activating save point 1, then clear the Dark mission before the Dark Gauge empties.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Alien Hunter
achievements.description: In Black Comet, defeat 60 Black Arms in 5:00.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: ...But I Know You're Just a Fake
achievements.description: In Lava Shelter, destroy 60 Eggman robots in 4:00.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Lava Magma Cruiser
achievements.description: In Lava Shelter, trigger some fast-rising lava magma in the 4th volcanic defense chamber while riding an Air Saucer.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Crocodilian Confusion
achievements.description: In Cosmic Fall on Expert Mode, meet Vector in the computer room.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Shooting Star
achievements.description: In Cosmic Fall on Expert Mode, clear the stage in 4:00 without using Chaos Control.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Proof that Shadow the Hedgehog Doesn't Suck
achievements.description: In Final Haunt, activate save point 6 without using vacuum weapons, vehicles, or Chaos Control.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Hero of Darkness
achievements.description: Defeat Devil Doom after having awakened both Dark Shadow and Hero Shadow in the same life.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Untouchable
achievements.description: Defeat Devil Doom without being hit.
achievements.author: Tybis
